title: Wedges Design System for React UI by Lemon Squeezy
content: # Lemon Squeezy Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Subscribe Wedges from Directories: Components: Wedges is a developer-friendly UI library by Lemon Squeezy, built with Radix primitives and Tailwind CSS. Wedges focuses on clean, reusable components that work out of the box and adapt to your existing styles. It’s ideal for projects that value speed, consistency, and developer experience. Color System Figma Repository Tokens Alert banner Avatar Badges Button Button group Checkbox Dropdown Label Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Select Slider Switch Tabs Tag Text area Text field Tooltip
